01 The truth no one says

Brilliant for one message. A stranger by the next.

  • 01 You are juggling a hundred things before anything has a system.
  • 02 The details slip: names, deadlines, promises, the opportunity you meant to chase.
  • 03 Evenings disappear into admin instead of the thing you actually came to build.
  • 04 You wish someone just knew your world and had your back.

It is not that you cannot do it. You should not have to do it alone.

02 What ZAKI promises

Not a chatbot. A presence that has your back.

ZAKI does not bury you in twenty features. It makes three quiet promises to anyone starting something that matters.

01

You are never alone in it.

ZAKI researches, drafts the email you have been dreading, follows through on the next step, and notices the wins no one else sees.

BeforeI am the only one who knows how this all fits together.
With ZAKIZAKI knows my world as well as I do.
02

Nothing important gets lost.

Ideas at 3 AM, contacts from that conference, the name you cannot afford to forget, the deadline you cannot miss: the Brain holds it all.

BeforeI know I wrote that down somewhere...
With ZAKIZAKI has it. ZAKI always has it.
03

You focus on the adventure.

Admin, follow-ups, research, prep: the cognitive weight that kills momentum. ZAKI carries the weight. You carry the vision.

BeforeSunday night inbox panic.
With ZAKISunday night planning the next move.
03 One login. Every ZAKI.

One companion across the whole chapter.

Each surface does one job well. Underneath, they all read from and write to the same Brain, so ZAKI learns your world instead of making you explain it twice.

Live · all plans

Agent

In your corner.

The agent that researches, drafts, plans, and follows through, with visible work phases so you always see what it is doing and why.

Explore the Agent
Free

Chat & Spaces

Focused workspaces.

Clean, separated spaces for the chapters you are building: a launch, a move, a book, a decision, each with its own context.

See Spaces
Included

Brain

Your world, remembered.

The people, projects, promises, preferences, and decisions ZAKI carries forward, mapped so you can see, edit, export, or forget.

Open the Brain
Private access

Learn

A tutor that remembers.

Turn your own material into explanations, practice, and recall. Learn stays gated until the full learner flow is ready.

Private access

Design & Career

For the work that scales.

Private lanes for interfaces and career moves. Same login, same memory, released only when the full flows are ready.

Every product flows through one identity, one allowance, and one memory policy. See the full product →

04 How it works

Show up in three minutes.

STEP 01

Connect

Sign in and start talking: in Arabic, English, or both. Bring the channels and spaces where your world already lives.

STEP 02

Remember

ZAKI builds a living memory of your journey: people, projects, priorities, promises, and preferences you can review.

STEP 03

Show up

Next session, next channel: ZAKI already has the context and brings the next useful step before you have to start over.

Warm does not mean vague. ZAKI shows everything it remembers, and you can edit or delete any of it, anytime.

05 Who it is for

Built for people starting something that matters.

Founders, adventurers, operators, anyone taking a leap that feels exciting and heavy at the same time. The outcome is the same: less overhead, more momentum.

Founders

Build the company, not the admin

A hundred decisions a day, relationships slipping, momentum fading. ZAKI remembers the business and clears the noise.

Adventurers

Start the next chapter

Moving countries, writing a book, changing careers, building a community: ZAKI keeps the train on the tracks.

Operators

An external brain

Too many threads, too much context-switching. ZAKI keeps the long thread so you do not have to.

See real use cases
06 The story

ZAKI started with a promise.

01 Never let go02 Keep getting better03 Be there when it is hard

ZAKI was not built in a product lab. It started in a conversation: never let go, keep getting better, be there when things get hard.

ZAKI does not replace you. ZAKI supports you.

So we built ZAKI around memory first, continuity first, and user control first: an intelligence layer that learns your world and shows up before you ask.

If you are starting something bold and it feels like you are doing it alone, you are not. Not anymore.

Read the full story →

300+ builders joined in the first week.

ZAKI remembered every visa deadline, every contact, every detail while I focused on actually building.

moved to Lisbon
"
ZAKI does not just do tasks. ZAKI gets the context. It is like having a counterpart who never needs the recap.

Founder
B2B marketplace
"
ZAKI keeps my research, my clients, and my deadlines organized, so I can actually think.

Author & consultant
writing while consulting
08 Pricing

Free today. Upgrade when ZAKI earns it.

Free is not a trick. Upgrade only when you want more room, deeper memory, and priority when it counts. Learn, Design, and Career stay gated until ready.
